**Provider**: (e.g., openai, anthropic, google)

**Go version**: (output of `go version`)

**GoAI version**: (e.g., v0.4.3)

**Description**

A clear description of the bug.

**Code to reproduce**

```go
// Minimal code that reproduces the issue
```

**Expected behavior**

What you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior**

What actually happened. Include error messages if applicable.

**Additional context**

Any other context (HTTP status codes, logs, etc.). Redact API keys.
